name: Aurora kino og Rådhuset
body: One building, two lives: Aurora Kino fills the ground floor and the levels below, while the town hall — the seat of the municipality — sits above. Films and civic events under the same roof in the city centre.

name: Kulturhuset
body: The city's culture house — a main venue for concerts, theatre and cultural events in the centre.

name: Biblioteket
body: Tromsø's public library and city archive — a reading room and meeting place in the heart of the centre.

name: Hålogaland Teater
body: The regional theatre on the southern waterfront — drama, performances and touring productions.

name: Tinghuset
body: The courthouse at Vervet, on the northern harbour front — seat of the district court.

name: Tromsø domkirke
body: The wooden cathedral at the heart of the city centre — one of Norway's largest wooden churches.
